landing.title: Turn your idea into a
landing.subtitle: Scriptoria guides you step by step using the Snowflake Method — the technique used by thousands of professional authors to structure their story before writing.
landing.feature1_desc: Premise, summary, characters, synopsis. Each step builds on the previous one for a solid and consistent novel.
landing.feature2_desc: Each project is isolated by database-level security. No one else can access your work.
landing.feature3_desc: Visualize where you are in your novel and pick up exactly where you left off.

auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.check_email_desc: A confirmation link has been sent to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.

dashboard.title: My projects
dashboard.no_projects_desc: Create your first project to start the Snowflake Method.
dashboard.create_error: Error creating project. Please try again.

people.title: Characters
people.subtitle: Create your characters, add a photo and reuse them across your projects.
people.locations_subtitle: Capture your inspiration spots with photos — even if you don't know yet where to use them.

project.documents_desc: Images, PDFs, DOC, TXT organized by chapter
project.writings_desc_empty: Organize your Word documents and writings by chapter

steps.premise_desc: In a single sentence (max 25 words), summarize your novel. It must include: the main character, their goal, and the main obstacle.
steps.premise_hint: Example: "An orphan wizard discovers his true identity and must face the evil mage who killed his parents."
steps.summary_desc: Expand the premise into a paragraph of 5 sentences: the setup, first conflict, second conflict, third conflict (climax), and resolution.
steps.summary_hint: Each sentence corresponds to an act of your novel.
steps.characters_desc: For each main character, define their name, goal, internal conflict, and character arc.
steps.characters_hint: Focus on 2 to 3 characters maximum for the MVP.
steps.synopsis_desc: Write a full one-page synopsis (about 500 words). Use everything you built in the previous steps.
steps.synopsis_hint: The synopsis must cover the entire story, including the ending.

documents.title: Written productions
documents.no_chapters_desc: Create a chapter to store your written files.
documents.create_chapter_error: Error creating chapter. Please try again.
documents.no_files: No files in this chapter. Drag files above to get started.
documents.upload_types: Images, PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT — max {size} MB per file

editor.no_chapters: No chapters available. First create a chapter in the Documents section.
